tool_input.command:
cat component/libraries/libraries-data-bind.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f's{i}: {s[\"title\"]}') for i,s in enumerate(d['sections'], 1)]" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "
import json
with open('component/libraries/libraries-data-bind.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
for s in d.get('sections', []):
    print(s.get('id',''), s.get('title',''))
"
